issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, focusing mainly on happy paths.

scenarios.name: declarative-deploy-pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Baseline ran stages sequentially with raw docker push and no credential bindings; treatment used a parallel Lint/Test/Security block, docker.build + docker.withRegistry, withCredentials([file(... KUBECONFIG)]) for Helm, and an input gate guarded by when { branch 'main' }.

scenarios.name: k8s-multi-container-agent
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used a single inbound-agent container with no container() switching; treatment defined a kubernetes pod yaml with node/docker/helm containers, set defaultContainer, and used container('docker')/container('helm') wrappers per stage.
